TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Lqluq lnglungan = Saw yami mqlinuc dqrijil nii o, smkuxul bi msupu pprngaw smhulis kari. Niqan kingal ka risaw o kiya ka rngagun dha balay, gaga pprngaw siida ka dqrijil osariyu ka kingal risaw da ngagun dha kari, gaga hmuya da rngagan ta balay risaw kiya hug. Ma ini hari qtai da, ga hmuya da? Rmngaw ka kingal pklug mnuda hiya snaw "gaga lqluq hari ka lnglungan niya ini kkray da" "kiya hug? Ini kkray da lnglungan na " msa ka kingal qrijil. "lq! Gaga mhnuk hari da." Msa ka kingal qrijil uri.
S.PHON: = lqluq lŇčluŇčan = saw jami mqlinu ¶ dq…ĺi…üil nii o, smkuxul bi msupu pp…ĺŇčaw smńßulis ka…ĺi. niqan kiŇčal ka …ĺisaw o kija ka …ĺŇčagun dńßa balaj, gaga pp…ĺŇčaw siida ka dq…ĺi…üil osa…ĺiju ka kiŇčal …ĺisaw da Ňčagun dńßa ka…ĺi, gaga ńßmuja da …ĺŇčagan ta balaj …ĺisaw kija ńßug. ma ini ńßa…ĺi qtai da, ga ńßmuja da? …ĺmŇčaw ka kiŇčal pklug mnuda ńßija snaw "gaga lqluq ńßa…ĺi ka lŇčluŇčan nija ini kk…ĺaj da" "kija ńßug? ini kk…ĺaj da lŇčluŇčan na " msa ka kiŇčal q…ĺi…üil. "lq! gaga mńßnuk ńßa…ĺi da." msa ka kiŇčal q…ĺi…üil u…ĺi.
S.FORM: = Lqluq lnglungan = Saw yami mqlinuc dqrijil nii o, smkuxul bi msupu pprngaw smhulis kari. Niqan kingal ka risaw o kiya ka rngagun dha balay, gaga pprngaw siida ka dqrijil osariyu ka kingal risaw da ngagun dha kari, gaga hmuya da rngagan ta balay risaw kiya hug. Ma ini hari qtai da, ga hmuya da? Rmngaw ka kingal pklug mnuda hiya snaw "gaga lqluq hari ka lnglungan niya ini kkray da" "kiya hug? Ini kkray da lnglungan na " msa ka kingal qrijil. "lq! Gaga mhnuk hari da." Msa ka kingal qrijil uri.

"lq! gaga mńßnuk ńßa…ĺi da." msa ka kiŇčal q…ĺi…üil u…ĺi.
